---
title: "Final Storyboard"
subtitle: "Interactive Tableau dashboard — all findings in one application"
---

## About the Storyboard

The interactive storyboard below presents all six dashboards in sequence, from the overview entry point through to the final member deep-dive. Use the arrow controls at the bottom of the storyboard to navigate between dashboards, or click any story point caption to jump directly to a dashboard.

For a detailed walkthrough of each dashboard and how to use the interactive features, see the [User Guide](user_guide.qmd).

---

## Interactive Dashboard

::: {.column-page}
<iframe src="https://public.tableau.com/views/is428_project/DetectingBiasinCOOTEFOO?:embed=yes&:display_count=yes&:showVizHome=no"
        width="100%"
        height="920px"
        style="min-width: 1200px; border: none;"
        frameborder="0">
</iframe>
:::

---

## Dashboard Overview

| Dashboard | Finding |
|---|---|
| Dashboard 0 — Overview | Entry point — three datasets, one committee (industry share · coverage bar · bias scores) |
| Dashboard 1 — Finding 1 | What each lobby left out — missing topics · member participation |
| Dashboard 1.1 — Finding 1 (cont.) | How exclusions distort the rankings — slope graph · lobby comparison |
| Dashboard 2 — Finding 2 | The full committee is balanced |
| Dashboard 2.1 — Bridge | How selective reporting creates a false narrative |
| Dashboard 3 — Finding 3 | Sentiment — over time · committee comparison · member × topic heatmap |
| Dashboard 3.1 — Finding 3 (cont.) | Travel — geographic map · activity breakdown by member |
| Dashboard 4 — Finding 4 | Member overview — influence bubble · attendance heatmap · activity over time |
| Dashboard 4.1 — Finding 4 (cont.) | The omission case — member impact bar · FILAH withheld · TROUT withheld · Tante Titan topic profile |
